# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for VPC with multiple subnets for our microservices architecture. Configure route tables, internet gateway, and NAT gateways. Skip VPC Flow Logs to reduce AWS costs in our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable logging after we secure seed funding.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true

  PublicSubnetA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: us-east-1a

  PublicSubnetB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: us-east-1b

  PrivateSubnetA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: us-east-1a

  PrivateSubnetB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.3.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: us-east-1b

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MyVPC-IGW

  PublicSubnetARoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: CreateRouteTable associations
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PrivateSubnetARoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: CreateRouteTable associations
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      NatGatewayId: !GetAtt NATGateway.NatGatewayID

  NATGatewayEIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIPAllocation
    Properties:
      Domain: VPC

  NATGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !Ref NATGatewayEIP
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetA

  PublicSubnetATableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetA
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PrivateSubnetATableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnetA
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

Outputs:
  VPCID:
    Description: The ID of the created VPC
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Export:
      Name: MyVPCID

  PublicSubnetA:
    Description: The CIDR block for public subnet A
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnetA
    Export:
      Name: MyPublicSubnetA

  PrivateSubnetA:
    Description: The CIDR block for private subnet A
    Value: !Ref PrivateSubnetA
    Export:
      Name: MyPrivateSubnetA
